author: Kian Kyars
name: Modal 8xH100 Timed Validation
blurb: Non-record submission: a 10-minute Modal 8xH100 run using the current root train_gpt.py snapshot and the published sp1024 export. The run stayed under the 16,000,000-byte cap, but the final int8+zlib roundtrip metric was 1.2296, so it is submitted on the non-record track.
